title: [YTP] Highrule
description:
Contest Closed - Winner - wowre2... This video is a bunch of clips from projects that I abandoned long ago. The contest at the end of the video is free for everyone to try. You will get to find out what the video will be ahead of time, and I'm also figuring out what else I will give as a reward. 

Send your caption as a message to Hurricoaster inbox.
